category_title: Struggling readers who use collaborative talk to clarify character motives and adapt schema
scenario_title: Disengagement during independent reading of complex texts
minimal_context: Jennifer is participating in independent reading time in her 7th-grade classroom and needs to select and read a content area nonfiction text.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for independent reading. Please choose a content area text from the science bin and begin reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Spends a large amount of time digging through the bin without selecting anything) I hate reading. Reading is boring.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please just pick a book and start.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Takes a book and starts skimming the text pictures and captions) Some of the words are hard. I don't get it.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to read the paragraphs.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Closes the book and stops reading) I'm confused by it. I get to the point that I barely understand it. My interest has gone down in middle school.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for independent reading. Please choose a content area text from the science bin and begin reading.

STUDENT: (Spends a large amount of time digging through the bin without selecting anything) I hate reading. Reading is boring.

TUTOR: Please just pick a book and start.

STUDENT: (Takes a book and starts skimming the text pictures and captions) Some of the words are hard. I don't get it.

TUTOR: Keep trying to read the paragraphs.

STUDENT: (Closes the book and stops reading) I'm confused by it. I get to the point that I barely understand it. My interest has gone down in middle school.
